results.title: LSU signee Lucas Nawrocki has made a decision regarding his future with the program
results.description: LSU high school signee and left-handed pitcher Lucas Nawrocki has taken his name out of the 2026 MLB Draft and is coming to school, he announced on social media Friday.

results.title: Elderly Couple Murder: Police Seek Interstate Help, Share CCTV Footage Across 3 States
results.description: Suspecting the involvement of professional shooters, police have shared the suspects' images with police in Haryana, Punjab and Rajasthan to verify whether they match records of known contract killers. The suspects, believed to be 30-38 years old, were captured wearing identical raincoats and gloves, apparently to conceal their identities and avoid leaving forensic evidence.

results.title: Gold prices decline by Rs1,400 per tola
results.description: ISLAMABAD - The prices of gold witnessed a significant decrease in the local market on Friday, with the price of 24-karat gold per tola decreased by Rs1,400 to settle at Rs432,436, according to rates issued by the All Pakistan Sarafa Gems and Jewellers Association.

results.title: Apple Music announces LADIPOE as July’s featured artist for Rap Life Africa
results.description: Apple Music’s Rap Life Radio, presented by Global Editorial Head of Hip-Hop and R&B Ebro Darden, will feature acclaimed Nigerian rapper LADIPOE this month, as Ebro and Africa Now Radio host Nandi Madida discuss his latest single, “Many People” The post Apple Music announces LADIPOE as July’s featured artist for Rap Life Africa appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: Indore Collector Shivam Verma Ensures School Admission For 40 Children After Issuing Birth Certificates
results.description: Once the birth certificates were issued, other essential documents, including Samagra IDs and Aadhaar cards, were also prepared. This initiative paved the way for the education and future of more than 40 children. On Friday, Collector Verma personally visited the school and formally facilitated the admission of these children.

results.title: Central DeWitt baseball falls to Mount Vernon in postseason play
results.description: Central DeWitt (20-15) fell to Mount Vernon 3-0 in the IHSAA Class 3A Substate 4.

results.title: West Vancouver man police describe as gang kingpin arrested in France
results.description: The province is seeking to seize a $5.5-million home the FBI and RCMP link to Indian gangs' extortion and drug trafficking in Metro Vancouver

results.title: UK-Thailand step up cannabis border controls and enforcement
results.description: Thai PBS Thailand has announced tougher penalties for cannabis smugglers following a continued increase in cannabis smuggling from Thailand to... The post UK-Thailand step up cannabis border controls and enforcement appeared first on ENG.MIZZIMA.COM .

results.title: Citizens reject overnight fuel price hike
results.description: LAHORE: Citizens across Lahore voiced strong rejection of the government’s latest increase in petroleum product prices, accusing the rulers of burdening households with taxes rather than reflecting global market trends. Residents argued that crude oil prices had not risen significantly in international markets, yet the government continued to raise domestic rates under the guise of [...] The post Citizens reject overnight fuel price hike appeared first on MM News .

results.title: Federal judge orders Wilmington to redo key ordinances tied to Amazon's $4 billion data center project
results.description: A judge ordered the city of Wilmington to redo key ordinances tied to a proposed Amazon data center after homeowners argued they were not properly notified before the measures were passed.

results.title: RSS sets agenda for nationwide shakha expansion at Belagavi meet
results.description: The meeting will comprehensively review reports of training camps conducted across the country after March 2026 and assess the implementation of action plans at the shakha level.

results.title: Langford and Burger homer in a four-run eighth as the Rangers beat the Astros 7-3
results.description: Wyatt Langford and Jake Burger homered in a four-run eighth inning as the Texas Rangers beat the Houston Astros 7-3 on Friday night. Langford’s leadoff homer and Burger’s three-run shot came off Bryan King (2-2) after the Astros had rallied...
